blocks.text: Camp Nou needs a miracle — Barcelona must erase Atlético's four-goal deficit
Real Madrid fell 0-1 to Getafe on Monday — a shock that shifted La Liga's calculus. But tonight Barcelona face their own reckoning: overturn a 4-0 Copa del Rey deficit against Atlético or exit.
